message.content:
@startuml
participant "client" as c1
participant "client" as c2
participant "alcor" as a1
participant "alcor" as a2

participant "sessions" as s1
participant "sessions" as s2

c1 --|> a1 : send publickey
a1 --|> c2 : send id and publickey
a1 --|> s1 : create session
a1 --|> s2 : create session

@enduml
